prompt: I have a dataset (RID 4-MULTI) that contains both Subject records and Image records — about 200 subjects and 8,000 images. I want to first see an overview of what's in it, then drill into just the subjects to see their demographics, and then look at the images separately to check the modality breakdown. How do I browse the different element types independently?

assertions.name: recognizes_multi_element
assertions.description: Should recognize this as a multi-element-type dataset with Subject and Image
assertions.check: acknowledges or explains that the dataset has multiple element types

assertions.name: lists_members_first
assertions.description: Should list members to see the two groups with counts
assertions.check: calls list_dataset_members and notes it returns results grouped by table

assertions.name: denormalizes_subjects_separately
assertions.description: Should show how to denormalize just the Subject records
assertions.check: calls denormalize_dataset with include_tables containing Subject (without Image)

assertions.name: denormalizes_images_separately
assertions.description: Should show how to denormalize just the Image records
assertions.check: calls denormalize_dataset with include_tables containing Image (separate from Subject call)

assertions.name: includes_related_tables_for_images
assertions.description: Should include feature/modality tables when denormalizing images for the modality breakdown
assertions.check: include_tables for the Image denormalization includes a feature or related table beyond just Image

assertions.name: explains_element_type_browsing
assertions.description: Should explain that denormalize lets you pick which element type to focus on
assertions.check: explicitly explains the pattern of using denormalize_dataset with different include_tables to browse different element types

assertions.name: does_not_flatten_everything
assertions.description: Should NOT try to join Subject and Image into one massive flat table
assertions.check: does not show a single denormalize_dataset call with both Subject and Image in include_tables as the primary approach
